summary: Story Multiplayer Engine Phase 2 - Frontend testing complete. All Episode vs Branch UI flows verified. ContinuationModal component renders correctly with both modes. Primary action buttons visible with correct gradients. Auto-next trigger section appears after 8s delay. Modal validation working (50 char minimum). All data-testid attributes present and functional.

issues: Force Share Gate modal blocks Episode/Branch buttons - users must dismiss it first or use 'Skip for now'. This is expected behavior but may cause confusion.

critical_code_review_comments: ContinuationModal.jsx is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Episode mode uses violet/blue gradient, Branch mode uses rose/orange gradient - visually distinct
Submit button correctly disabled when story text < 50 characters
Parent story context displayed correctly with title and story snippet
context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Multiplayer Engine Phase 2 frontend fully tested. ContinuationModal component verified with both episode and branch modes. Key findings: (1) App loads without errors, no import issues, (2) ContinuationModal imports correctly from components folder, (3) Primary Episode button (violet/blue gradient) and Fork Story button (rose/orange gradient) both visible in PostGenPhase, (4) Auto-next trigger section appears after 8s delay with both buttons, (5) ContinuationModal opens correctly when clicking either button, (6) Episode mode shows 'Continue Next Episode' header, Branch mode shows 'Fork This Story' header, (7) Branch mode shows competition callout about competing for #1 spot, (8) Submit button disabled when story text < 50 chars, (9) All data-testid attributes present: continuation-modal, continuation-modal-episode, continuation-modal-branch, primary-episode-btn, primary-branch-btn, auto-next-episode-btn, auto-next-branch-btn, multiplayer-continue-actions, branch-competition-callout, continuation-title-input, continuation-story-input, submit-continuation-btn, close-continuation-modal, cancel-continuation-btn. Note: Force Share Gate modal may block button clicks - use JavaScript click or dismiss modal first.

frontend_tests.primary_branch_btn_visible: PASS - data-testid='primary-branch-btn' found with rose/orange gradient
frontend_tests.auto_next_trigger_appears: PASS - Appears after 8s delay with both Episode and Fork buttons
frontend_tests.auto_next_episode_btn: PASS - data-testid='auto-next-episode-btn' visible in trigger section
frontend_tests.auto_next_branch_btn: PASS - data-testid='auto-next-branch-btn' visible in trigger section
frontend_tests.branch_competition_callout: PASS - data-testid='branch-competition-callout' visible in branch mode
frontend_tests.close_button_works: PASS - Modal closes when clicking close button

features_verified.continuation_modal_component: ContinuationModal.jsx renders correctly with episode and branch modes
features_verified.primary_action_buttons: Next Episode (violet/blue) and Fork Story (rose/orange) buttons visible and distinct
features_verified.auto_next_trigger: Shows Episode and Fork buttons instead of generic Continue button after 8s delay
features_verified.modal_opens_on_click: ContinuationModal opens when clicking Next Episode or Fork Story buttons
features_verified.correct_header_text: Episode mode: 'Continue Next Episode', Branch mode: 'Fork This Story'
features_verified.parent_story_context: Modal shows parent story title and story snippet
features_verified.branch_competition_callout: Branch mode shows callout about competing for #1 spot
